name: Possible Info Stealer via Uncompressing and Executing Batch Files
description: Detects the uncompressing and execution of batch files associated with Lumma Stealer. These stealers exfiltrate browser credentials and cryptocurrency wallet information, posing significant security risks.

filterSets.name: Possible Info Stealer via Uncompressing and Executing Batch Files

author: Yusuf Madkour & Ahmed Kamal
